allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d['feeds']\), 'feeds:'\); [print\(' -', f['id']\) for f in d['feeds']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('items:', d.get\('total',0\)\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\('first:', items[0].get\('title',''\)[:80] if items else 'none'\); print\('url:', items[0].get\('link',''\)[:100] if items else 'none'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:', d.get\('title',''\)\); print\('siteName:', d.get\('siteName',''\)\); print\('byline:', d.get\('byline',''\)\); print\('wordCount:', d.get\('wordCount',0\)\); print\('content preview:', \(d.get\('textContent',''\) or ''\)[:200]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); print\('title:', d.get\('title',''\)[:80]\); print\('siteName:', d.get\('siteName',''\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('url',''\)[:100]\); print\('wordCount:', d.get\('wordCount',0\)\); print\('content preview:', \(d.get\('textContent',''\) or ''\)[:180]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'C:\\\\temp\\\\article.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); print\('title:', d.get\('title',''\)[:100]\); print\('siteName:', d.get\('siteName',''\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('url',''\)[:120]\); print\('wordCount:', d.get\('wordCount',0\)\); print\('message:', d.get\('message',''\)[:200]\); print\('content preview:', \(d.get\('textContent',''\) or ''\)[:200]\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'C:\\\\temp\\\\article.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); print\('title:', d.get\('title',''\)[:100]\); print\('siteName:', d.get\('siteName',''\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('url',''\)[:120]\); print\('wordCount:', d.get\('wordCount',0\)\); print\('content preview:', \(d.get\('textContent',''\) or ''\)[:300]\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import json,sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); d=json.load\(open\(r'C:\\\\temp\\\\article2.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); print\('title:', d.get\('title',''\)[:100]\); print\('siteName:', d.get\('siteName',''\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('url',''\)[:120]\); print\('wordCount:', d.get\('wordCount',0\)\); print\('message:', d.get\('message',''\)[:200]\); print\('---content preview:'\); print\(\(d.get\('textContent',''\) or ''\)[:300]\)")
